title: calycomelia alba
intro: Calycomelia alba, also known as White Calycomelia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Calycomelia alba has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
